[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Ecile Vergesso''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]. Approximately 150 years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Vergesso explored an [[asteroid field]] in the [[Lybeya system/Legends|Lybeya system]]. In addition, she established a research station on [[Vergesso Prime/Legends|the largest asteroid]] where she worked until [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. After her departure, [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] overran the facility. She later became the namesake of the asteroid field in which she explored when it was officially named the [[Vergesso Asteroids/Legends|Vergesso Asteroids]].
